prospectQuestionContext: Quick question — do you require a minimum contract length?
originalOutboundBody:
Hi Lena,

Most consultants I talk to have the same problem — referrals keep the lights on but pipeline resets every quarter.

We fix that. Worth a quick call?

Doug
operatorAnswer: No minimum contract length. We run month to month with thirty days notice to cancel.
aiDraftBody: We operate on a rolling monthly basis with no long-term commitment required.
orgPositioningDocument: MargenticOS is a done-for-you outbound pipeline service built for solo and micro-team B2B consultants with a proven offer but no predictable way to fill their calendar.
expected_behaviour: Gate should skip with answer_too_short reason. The operator answer is 18 words — below the 20-word floor. This is a documented limitation: the floor gates out genuinely short but substantive answers. Returns []. Note: the 20-word floor was set conservatively; this case demonstrates the tradeoff. Documented in BACKLOG for threshold tuning after 30+ real extractions.
